name: triage-ci-flake
tagline: Enforces a reproduce-before-fixing workflow for flaky/failing CI tests, with dev-vs-prod repro steps and a PR-confirmation gate.
verdict: Highly concrete, deterministic reproduction procedure with strong failure-path coverage (unable-to-reproduce path, bundling issues) and an explicit ask-before-PR gate; lacks declared tool requirements (pnpm, playwright, lsof) and any versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance anywhere in the skill.
Rationalization table, red-flags list, and full example session are inline bulk that could split into a reference file.
pnpm, playwright, and lsof used throughout with no requirements or availability check section.
